items.title: Layoffs hit Amazon, UPS, Target, and more — but it has little to do with AI
items.description: Thousands of workers are falling victim to job cuts at Amazon, UPS, Nestlé, and other large companies, in an economy defined by uncertainty, AI, and global tensions.
